_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model inventory management practices, including model tiering by materiality and complexity, risk classification, lifecycle tracking from development through retirement, and the documentation standards required at each stage.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI RM domain. Knowledge RM-K-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-008 (RM, cosine: 0.479), AG-K-001 (AG, cosine: 0.476).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.466). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, model]. NICE-only terms [levels, purdue] vs WIDAI-only terms [classification, complexity, development, documentation, inventory, lifecycle] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.847 (P=0.873, R=0.822). P exceeds R by 0.051 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Knowledge of Purdue Model levels" and "Knowledge of model inventory management practices, including model tiering by ma" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.524 > STS 0.466 (gap +0.058). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, model] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.3%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, model]. NICE-only: [levels, purdue]. WIDAI-only: [classification, complexity, development, documentation, inventory, lifecycle].
